title: Effort-scaling instructions to match task complexity
source: Anthropic multi-agent research system engineering blog
description: Pass ticket complexity (XS-XL) to agent prompts with calibrated effort guidance. Currently all agents get identical instructions regardless of task size.
proposed_changes: Add COMPLEXITY_GUIDANCE dict mapping XS-XL to specific effort rules (files to touch, test requirements, analysis depth). Inject into prompt based on ticket estimated_complexity.
